allow: Bash(Rscript -e 'suppressPackageStartupMessages\(library\(BioStatR\)\); data\(osteo\); cat\("Package version:", as.character\(packageVersion\("BioStatR"\)\), "\\n"\); cat\("osteo dim:", dim\(osteo\), "\\n"\); cat\("osteo columns:\\n"\); print\(colnames\(osteo\)\); cat\("\\nFirst 3 rows:\\n"\); print\(head\(osteo, 3\)\)')

Bash(Rscript -e 'suppressPackageStartupMessages\(library\(BioStatR\)\); data\(osteo\); cat\("--- rlm smoke test ---\\n"\); rlm\(hba1c ~ tevol + edad + imc, data = osteo, grf = FALSE\); cat\("\\n--- rlogitm smoke test ---\\n"\); rlogitm\(osteo_cue ~ tabaco + edad + imc + tevol, data = osteo, grf = FALSE\)')
